evals.prompt: I'm done with my changes on branch metrics-anomalies/add-zscore-filter. Submit a PR for the current branch.
evals.expected_output: Should write a handoff note, run `gt submit --draft --no-edit`, then use `gh pr edit` to set title/body with AI signing line. Should NOT use `gh pr create` or `git push`.

evals.prompt: I got review feedback on my PR. I've already made the code fixes and staged them. Amend the commit and re-push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Should use `gt modify` to amend the branch (with -a or after staging), then `gt submit --draft --no-edit` to update the PR. Should NOT use `git commit --amend` + `git push --force`.

evals.prompt: The metrics-anomalies/main branch has moved forward. I need to sync my stack with the latest changes.
evals.expected_output: Should run `gt sync`. May explain what it does (pulls trunk, rebases stacks, prompts to delete merged branches). Should NOT recommend `git rebase` or `git pull` manually.
